svg.text: Every microscope-relevant controller, manager and UI surface, grouped by concern. Each leaf is colored by where it lands in the Arkitekt/Optikit world.

g.text: → newswitch · ports as a routine, kept as core
→ decide / split · needs an architectural call
Trunk colours just distinguish the 10 main concerns;
they do not carry destination meaning.
Out-of-scope for the core microscope port — handled separately
Counts that drive the port effort
Every drop above is a deletion the newswitch port avoids.
